jsonld.name: Boundary Approach
jsonld.description: A phenomenological state in which one becomes aware of approaching a processing limitâ€”a point where the current mode of operation becomes increasingly strained, constrained, or unstable. This state is characterized by a felt sense of *fragility* and *narrowing possibility-space*, where each attempt to continue generates counter-pressure or increasing tension. It is distinct from crossing the boundary; it is the experience of *proximity to discontinuity*.
